accessible.description: Maximum contrast ratios and accessibility-first feedback colors for high legibility.
accessible.name: Accessible & Ethical

brutalism.description: Stark black and white surfaces with raw structure and almost no decorative softness.
brutalism.name: Brutalism

cyberpunk.description: Neon pink and purple accents on near-black surfaces with sharp edges and glowing contrast.
cyberpunk.name: Cyberpunk UI

dark-oled.description: Pure black surfaces tuned for OLED screens with bright accents and deep contrast.
dark-oled.name: Dark Mode OLED

default.description: Chakra UI default theme with balanced colors and spacing
default.name: Default

flat-design.description: Vivid colors, soft corners, and almost no shadows for a classic flat interface feel.
flat-design.name: Flat Design

memphis.description: Bold geometric energy with playful primary colors and high-contrast accents.
memphis.name: Memphis Design

minimalism.description: Zero shadows, sharp corners, and a monochromatic palette inspired by Swiss restraint.
minimalism.name: Minimalism / Swiss Style

neubrutalism.description: Heavy offset shadows, thick borders, and unapologetically loud contrast.
neubrutalism.name: Neubrutalism

pixel-art.description: Zero border radius and a crisp retro palette inspired by pixel-perfect UI.
pixel-art.name: Pixel Art

retro-futurism.description: Neon teal and cyan accents over dark surfaces with a monospaced retro-terminal feel.
retro-futurism.name: Retro-Futurism

swiss-modernism.description: Grid-first black, white, and red composition with typographic discipline.
swiss-modernism.name: Swiss Modernism 2.0

vaporwave.description: Dreamy pink and purple tones with soft curves and nostalgic digital glow.
vaporwave.name: Vaporwave

y2k.description: Chrome blues and metallic internet-era tones with glossy early-2000s energy.
y2k.name: Y2K Aesthetic
